episodes.title: The Spiritual Damage After Leaving a Cult Ministry | The Hidden Trauma No One Talks About
episodes.description:
What really happens after you leave a high-control religious ministry? In this powerful live stream, we uncover the spiritual, emotional, and psychological damage that can follow departure from environments like Straitway Truth Ministries. Many speak about the exit, few speak about the aftermath.

We’re discussing spiritual trauma, identity confusion, fear conditioning, religious PTSD, isolation, manipulation, shame cycles, and the silent battles former members face long after they walk away. When faith becomes control, when leadership replaces discernment, and when questioning becomes rebellion,  the damage runs deeper than most realize.

This stream is not about attacking individuals, it’s about exposing patterns of spiritual abuse, reclaiming identity, and restoring faith after religious control. If you’ve ever struggled with fear, guilt, anxiety, or spiritual confusion after leaving a high-control church, this conversation is for you.

We’ll also examine warning signs of spiritual manipulation, how to heal your relationship with God, and how to rebuild your mind and spirit after spiritual captivity.

This is for survivors. This is for truth-seekers. This is for those rebuilding their faith without fear.

If you’ve experienced spiritual abuse, share your story in the comments. Your voice matters.

episodes.title: PASTOR DOWELL EXPOSED by Ex-Jehovah’s Witness: Bethany Leger Tells the Truth About CULT CONTROL!
episodes.description:
In this explosive Warsheep Podcast LIVE, we welcome Bethany Leger, a brave woman who broke free from the psychological prison of the Jehovah’s Witnesses after spending 30 years inside the cult. Raised under crushing expectations of obedience, shame, and faux holiness, Bethany began unraveling when her mental health collapsed in her 20s. Her eating disorder wasn’t vanity, it was survival. She lost her family but gained her freedom.

Now, she’s calling out the darkness in religious institutions that hide behind righteousness, including her raw perspective on **Pastor Dowell**, who’s made waves with his doctrine and masculine movement. Bethany doesn’t hold back as she draws shocking parallels between cult-like control, emotional manipulation, and spiritual abuse in both systems.

Watch live as she shakes the foundation of religious deception, warns about toxic authority, and empowers others to think for themselves. This is not just a conversation, it’s a confrontation** with truth.

🔴 *This live stream contains personal testimony, criticism, and commentary protected under Section 107 of the U.S. Copyright Act of 1976 “Fair use” allows for the use of copyrighted material for the purposes of education, commentary, criticism, and news reporting.*
